messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] mail list archive
messages.body_plain:
Mail list administrator,

Please is it possible to have this mailing list also on the archive 'mail-archive.com', similarly to others such as:

https://www.mail-archive.com/r-help at r-project.org/info.html
https://www.mail-archive.com/r-sig-debian at r-project.org

Want to be able to subscribe via RSS in an RSS reader, e.g.:

https://www.mail-archive.com/r-help at r-project.org/maillist.xml

Thanks.
